title: Just Play Lite
description: It is similar like JustPlay but it is smaler than normal JustPlay modpack
body:
The JustPlay Lite is a compact and lighter version of the popular Just Play modpack, designed for those who want to enjoy the Minecraft experience with lower system resource requirements.

This version focuses on exploration, building, and adventure, but with fewer mods, offering faster performance and simpler gameplay. Despite its smaller size, it still provides plenty of opportunities: roam mountain ranges, explore the ocean depths, or build your own communities, towers, and empires.

The JustPlay Lite modpack retains the harmony and charm of the original, while delivering a streamlined experience for players who prefer a minimalist approach. Step into this lightweight world and let your adventures unfold here too!

Incloude some external mod Mowzie's Mobs https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mowzies-mobs Aquaculture 2 https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture
